docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GAVIN TEAGUE, PROJECT MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT RONAN CONSTRUCTION, INC.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CORONADO, MARCO JOSHUA RONAN CONSTRUCTION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MCGILL. PLAINTIFF MARCO JOSHUA CORONADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RONAN CONSTRUCTION, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GAVIN TEAGUE, PROJECT MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2026 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY CORONADO, MARCO JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT RONAN CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-05-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RONAN CONSTRUCTION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORONADO, MARCO JOSHUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RONAN CONSTRUCTION, INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT AND THAT NEGLIGENCE CAUSED HIS DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
